hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER: Re-read CLAUDE.md. 1) NEVER work in main worktree — use git worktree add. 2) Check Required Reading table before coding. 3) Bug fixes MUST include: root cause, regression test, systemic prevention.'

echo 'REMINDER: Re-read CLAUDE.md. 1) NEVER work in main worktree — use git worktree add. 2) Check Required Reading table before coding. 3) Bug fixes MUST include: root cause, regression test, systemic prevention.'

hooks.prompt:
Review the conversation above. Did Claude fix a bug in this turn (not just add features, refactor, or answer questions — specifically fix broken behavior)?

If YES, check whether Claude performed ALL of these steps:
1. Applied the fix
2. Added a regression test
3. Stated the bug category and proposed systemic prevention
4. Updated CLAUDE.md if the bug revealed a non-obvious pattern

If a bug was fixed but step 3 is missing, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Bug fix detected but systemic prevention reflection was not performed."}.

If no bug was fixed, or all steps were completed, return {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: Re-read CLAUDE.md before your next task.'
